summary: Completed Phase 2 UI redesign testing for contact detail page. All features verified: compact left-aligned hero, sticky action bar at bottom, inline tags, compact stats line, Next Actions with pre-written messages, and Log Reply from both feed and sticky bar. Backend API endpoints working correctly.

backend.GET /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/s: PASS - Returns empty actions array (no pending actions)
PASS - Returns 'Thank them for their review!' action with suggested message
backend.POST /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/: PASS - Creates customer_reply event with direction=inbound

frontend.compact_hero_layout: PASS - Photo tile top-left with touchpoint badge, name to the right
frontend.compact_stats_line: PASS - Shows 'X touches · Y msgs · Z campaigns · N referrals' format
frontend.sticky_action_bar: PASS - SMS, Call, Email, Review, Card, Congrats, Log Reply buttons at bottom
frontend.inline_tags: PASS - Tags display inline next to contact name in hero (when present)
frontend.relationship_intel: PASS - Section visible with AI-generated insights
frontend.voice_notes_section: PASS - Record button and existing notes with transcripts visible
frontend.relationship_feed: PASS - Renamed activity feed with event count and search
frontend.log_reply_composer: PASS - Shows 'Paste customer's message' with input field and Photo button
frontend.inbound_badge: PASS - Green INBOUND badge on Customer Reply events
frontend.customer_badge: PASS - Yellow CUSTOMER badge on customer-initiated activities
frontend.next_actions_section: PASS - Shows suggested actions with pre-written messages (jimmy contact)
frontend.thank_review_action: PASS - 'Thank them for their review!' action visible for jimmy

verified_features.compact_hero: Photo tile top-left with touchpoint badge (e.g., '116'), name right-aligned, 'Xdays in system' subtitle
verified_features.compact_stats_line: Displays as 'X touches · Y msgs · Z campaigns · N referrals' below hero
verified_features.sticky_action_bar: Fixed bottom bar with 7 buttons: SMS, Call, Email, Review, Card, Congrats, Log Reply
verified_features.next_actions: Shows prioritized suggested actions with star icon, description, pre-written message preview, and action arrow
verified_features.log_reply: Works from both 'Log Customer Reply' button in feed and 'Log Reply' in sticky bar - opens inline composer with text input and photo attachment option
verified_features.event_badges: INBOUND (green) for customer replies, CUSTOMER (yellow) for customer-initiated activities

seed_data_creation: Created test customer reply via API during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 UI redesign complete and verified. Contact detail page now has: (1) Compact hero with photo left, name right, touchpoint badge; (2) Compact stats line; (3) Sticky action bar at bottom with 7 quick actions; (4) Next Actions section showing AI-suggested follow-ups with pre-written messages; (5) Log Reply works from both feed button and sticky bar. Jimmy contact (69a4a25cfa75497baf35242e) has unacknowledged review showing 'Thank them for their review!' suggested action.
